_about: Registry of musings. The site build (utils/python/build_site.py) reads this to discover each musing folder, run its build-musing.py, and render the landing-page rows. Optional per-musing 'emblem' (an SVG in the musing folder, inlined into the landing row) and 'theme' ('font': serif|sans; 'light'/'dark': token maps emitted as --m-<key> CSS vars) theme each row after its musing. Schema + workflow: musing-tech-notes.md.

musings.name: Minimalist Space Logistics
musings.description: A 4X space game stripped to a single trading ship: out-logistic an unwinnable war until the front can win it for you.

musings.name: Thaumodynamics
musings.description: An invented field theory of fire and lightning — two Maxwell-mirror fields coupled to heat and charge — worked out three ways: a monograph, a problem set, and a duel chronicled exchange by exchange.

musings.name: Logical Magic (LoMa)
musings.description: A magic system where casting is proving: the world is a model, spells are sentences it does not yet satisfy, and every miracle is audited in proof-strokes and fact-flips. The metamathematical sibling of Thaumodynamics.

musings.name: Space Feudal
musings.description: Recreate the economic problems feudalism actually solved — courier-lag authority, fuel that fades, keeps on the lane mouths — under a stipulated FTL, and let lords condense back out of the sim. A design brief plus a 27-row ledger lining up the old and the to-be, a siege doctrine with a system map, and six consequence threads.

musings.name: MIDI Drum Coach
musings.description: A practice tool as a game-design musing: plug an e-kit into the browser and a legible director suggests the next groove — step-grid notation, millisecond judging, rush/drag bias, and rules it explains out loud. Works kit-free via keyboard and on-screen pads.

musings.name: Adventuring Guild Teller
musings.description: You are the desk the whole town crosses: stamp quest paperwork into a flow state by day, route quests and matchmake parties after hours, and author the very characters whose exploits reach you as morning gossip. Papers, Please hands, Stardew heart, Tomodachi Life soul — at pitch stage, read back in twelve claims: nine settled by correction round 1, three open. The townee fish-bowl now has its machinery studied and picked, and an observatory prototype proposed in ten more claims.
